eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Idaho; at 8:08 AM on AUG 22, 2019 Effective until 10:08 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an activation of the amber alert system.  This is the Idaho State Communications Center. We have just received this important information regarding a child abducted in Mineral County in Montana. The Mineral County Sheriffs Office is looking for a child who was last seen in Deborgia Montana and is believed to be in danger. The childs name is Tyran Ban Campen. He is 7 years old. Authorities say that the child may be in the company of Lanetta Kay Mellstead and they may be traveling in a Black 1996 Ford Explorer. License plate number 5 4 0 6 7 6 B that may be heading towards Nampa Idaho. If you have any information on the whereabouts of this child, please contact Mineral County Sheriffs Office immediately at 460-822-3555.
